case_for: Stafford has shown he can produce ceiling weeks (wk8, wk9) when the Rams' passing game clicks, giving him upside beyond the modest projection.
case_against: His recent floor games (wk4, wk7, wk10) show significant week-to-week volatility with multiple sub-10-point outings, and the pregame projection sits well below the 12.0 threshold.
